falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price rises above the previous 52-week high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market conviction, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a confirmed trend

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would directly contradict the current pattern's validity (bottom_2024_aug) and invalidate the 'HOLD' signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
